description_long: This is a classic blue sports car with white racing stripes running from the front to the rear, evoking the iconic Shelby Cobra design. The car features a low, aerodynamic body with pronounced wheel arches and a convertible open-top cockpit, complete with two black bucket seats and a roll bar behind the driver. The wheels are large, black, and fitted with visible white-lettered tires, adding to its aggressive stance. Chrome side exhaust pipes, a detailed front grille, and round headlights further enhance its vintage racing appeal. The dashboard and steering wheel are visible, suggesting a driver-focused interior. The overall look is sleek, muscular, and built for speed, making it a standout vehicle in any urban or racing environment.
description: A blue, open-top sports car with white racing stripes, black wheels, and a classic, muscular design. Features include chrome side pipes, a roll bar, and a driver-focused cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue body, white stripes, chrome side exhaust, black wheels, and open cockpit with two seats.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual white stripes, roll bar, rear lights, and license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible side exhaust, wheels, and open cockpit.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded nose, grille, headlights, and the full length of the white racing stripes.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with visible lug nuts and white-lettered tires
